top.title: What do Trump's latest comments on leaving Nato mean for the alliance?
top.summary: Trump has criticised Nato members for showing a lack of support for US objectives in Iran.

top.title: Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks and hits areas not in Hezbollah's control
top.summary: Attacks have continued as Israel has announced its intention to control swathes of south Lebanon.

top.title: Families cram into Greek court for trial into deadliest train crash
top.summary: Fifty-seven people were killed when two trains collided in 2023 in the worst rail accident in Greek history, with 36 accused in a trial expected to last years.

top.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
top.summary: The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

top.title: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
top.summary: Anthropic, the company behind the AI coding assistant, said it was fixing a problem blocking users.

top.title: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city
top.summary: Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.
